evidence.claim: Used GANs, Haystack, BentoML, MLflow, TensorFlow, QLoRA, FAISS, Sentence Transformers, RAG, NLP, LangChain, Image Classification, PyTorch, Pinecone, Vector Search, Forecasting, and Recommendation Systems
evidence.source_text: Skills: GANs (advanced, 49mo, 16 endorsements); Haystack (advanced, 60mo, 50 endorsements); BentoML (intermediate, 12mo, 7 endorsements); MLflow (advanced, 20mo, 25 endorsements); TensorFlow (expert, 60mo, 28 endorsements); QLoRA (advanced, 49mo, 10 endorsements); FAISS (expert, 90mo, 4 endorsements); Sentence Transformers (expert, 95mo, 47 endorsements); RAG (expert, 89mo, 23 endorsements); NLP (expert, 83mo, 2 endorsements); LangChain (expert, 86mo, 49 endorsements); Image Classification (intermediate, 20mo, 12 endorsements); PyTorch (expert, 79mo, 25 endorsements); Pinecone (expert, 53mo, 47 endorsements); Vector Search (advanced, 29mo, 34 endorsements); Forecasting (advanced, 59mo, 52 endorsements); Recommendation Systems (expert, 36mo, 60 endorsements)

evidence.claim: Developed semantic search for 500K documents with 35% relevance improvement
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents... Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup

evidence.claim: Implemented RAG-based chatbot reducing ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Acted as de-facto ML lead on a small team
evidence.source_text: Recently, I've been the de-facto ML lead on a small team, shipping models across NLP and recsys.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes learning through shipping real systems and production experience
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Experienced in debugging production ranking issues and distinguishing signal from noise
evidence.source_text: I've spent enough time debugging production ranking issues to know which signals matter and which are noise.
